demo.title: scam-analysis.sh
demo.code:
# Analyze a token for scam / rug-pull risk
bankr prompt "Analyze 0xAbC...123 on Base for scam risk"

# Compare old vs new contracts in a migration
bankr prompt "Compare these two tokens for migration scam: 0xOLD 0xNEW"

# Cross-reference a project's Twitter claims vs on-chain reality
bankr prompt "Is @SomeProject a rug? Check deployer and holders"

setup: Optionally set `BASE_RPC_URL` env var for faster reads (public RPC used by default)
Provide a token address and chain to start an analysis
